localizations.title: The Ocean's Heart
localizations.hint_97: Everything is going dark. Find the card depicting darkness.
localizations.hint_3: Rotate the card as indicated. The number will transform into a letter.
localizations.hint_38_first: It looks like you should place your hand here.
localizations.hint_91: Find the card depicting the boat's bridge.
localizations.hint_42: You should deflect the light towards the crystals to illuminate the cave.
localizations.hint_100: To find this machine's number, rotate the card to the right.
localizations.hint_7: You must free the creature from the net by using a sharp object.
localizations.hint_25_first: There are 5 caves here. Their arrangement is the same pattern as the ends of the glowing staff (39).
localizations.hint_25: To choose the correct cave, consider what the pattern would look like if the staff were flipped horizontally, and notice that one of the branches has a distinct mark.
localizations.hint_37: The creature left a trail behind as she fled. Follow her to find a number.
localizations.hint_60_first: Even though the scene is plunged into darkness, there are a few elements on the card which will reveal its proper nature.
localizations.hint_60: This card is a red card. You only need a little light to pierce the darkness.
localizations.hint_62: This sand appears to have come from the cracked hourglass. You might as well complete the pattern.
localizations.hint_0: The Triton is obscuring the last digit of a number. You must find a way to look behind him to find the first digit of the number.
localizations.hint_98_first: Install the crane by properly overlapping it atop the boat before rotating it.
localizations.hint_98: Rotate the crane to the right until a number is revealed.
localizations.hint_27: The realm of the Tritons and Mermaids is at the very bottom of the sea. What number comes to mind when looking for the bottom?
localizations.hint_72_first: The Ocean's Heart was located at the center of this structure. Therefore, the object you seek must be some kind of disc.
localizations.hint_72: You have previously seen a disc with an eight-pointed star on it.
localizations.hint_machine_3: These reefs are arranged in a pattern similar to the objects on the table.
localizations.hint_45_first: This is the gate to the Sanctuary of the Mermaids. To enter, you must trace the Mermaid symbol.
localizations.hint_45: You know the symbol for the Tritons (0) and the symbol representing both Mermaids and Tritons (A).
localizations.hint_99: She is trying to communicate with you. Reach out and make contact with her.
localizations.answer_hint_97: Look for the card with the darkest back.
localizations.answer_hint_3: Steer the helm to port by rotating the boat (3) 90 degrees to the left.  The 3 becomes an M.
localizations.answer_hint_38: Place your hand (5) on the door. However, remember that Mermaids only have 4 fingers. Since card 5 depicts your hand with 5 fingers, to add only 4 fingers you'll use the number 4 instead.  38 + 4 = 42
localizations.answer_hint_91: To get to the deck, look for the card that depicts a ship's deck.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Use your shaving kit (30) on the cave (42). 30 + 42 = 72
localizations.answer_hint_100: You must steer the helm to starboard, which is the opposite direction of port (which was previously requested) (3); therefore, you need to turn right. Rotate card (M) 90 degrees to the right, changing the M into a 3. Access Machine 3.
localizations.answer_hint_7: Use your shaving kit (30) on the net (7). 30 + 7 = 37
localizations.answer_hint_25: The arrangement of the caves represents that of the branches of the glowing staff (39), if the staff were flipped horizontally. One of the branches has a mark on it, indicating which cave you should enter (+21). 39 + 21 = 60
localizations.answer_hint_37: The trail of bubbles left by the Mermaid forms the number 25.
localizations.answer_hint_60: A puzzle piece is visible in the upper right side of the card; it's in the same shape as the red puzzle pieces, so card 60 must be red. Use the glowing staff (39) to drive away the monsters. 60 + 39 = 99
localizations.answer_hint_62: Use the hourglass (14) on the table (62) to complete the pattern of sand on the table. 62 + 14 = 76
localizations.answer_hint_0: You can see a partial 5 behind the Triton. If you flip this card over, you will see an inverted 4 behind the anchor. Combine these two digits to get 45.
localizations.answer_hint_98: Place the crane on the boat (3) and rotate it to starboard (which is the opposite of port), meaning to the right. As you do so, the number 97 will be visible in the water.
localizations.answer_hint_27: The Sanctuary you are looking for is at the very bottom of the sea. Therefore, you must take the card with the lowest value, which is card 0.
localizations.answer_hint_72: According to what you found in the Sanctuary, the Ocean's Heart is a round disc-like stone featuring an eight-pointed star. You have already come across this stone in your cabin. Access Machine 1 again and press the stone matching this description.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_3: Combine the hourglass (14) with the objects and sand on our table (62) to complete the path which you must take (76). Then, trace that pattern on your device.
localizations.answer_hint_45: The symbol representing the Mermaids is found by taking the symbol on the shield held by the statue (A), without the part depicting the Triton's symbol (0).
localizations.answer_hint_99: To establish contact with the Mermaid, touch the Mermaid's four fingers simultaneously.
localizations.machine_1: Lôh-Gan! It's time to wake up!
localizations.machine_10: The sharp sting of the urchin's spine causes you to flinch. Around you, the Sanctuary seems to melt away, returning you to a starkly different reality. You find yourself back on your ship's deck! Take card 3 from the discard pile, then discard card 10.
localizations.machine_99: At the Mermaid's gentle touch, the pressure on your eardrums suddenly eases, and you find you are able to understand her language! "You saved me, stranger! I am Shâ-nah, of the Merfolk. What's your name? Lôh-Gan? Well, this rope cage trapped me while I was on a quest to save the Merfolk. They are perishing, and the only way to save them is to find the Ocean's Heart, a powerful ancient artifact. Unfortunately, the Sanctuary that houses it is located within the realm of the Tritons. Will you help me find it, Lôh-Gan?"
localizations.machine_3: A little surprised, you manage to navigate effortlessly through the reefs.
localizations.machine_1_early: Captain, you need to come up to the deck right away!
localizations.machine_1_end_1: In a frenzy, you snatch the stone, which you discovered caught in your nets during a recent fishing trip. You hurry to the railing and toss it overboard. For a brief moment, it floats on the surface of the water before slowly sinking into the depths…
localizations.machine_1_end_2: Years later, while savoring your well-earned retirement, you recount your tale of what you witnessed that day to anyone willing to listen: a four-fingered hand rising from the sea to wave at you, followed by a magnificent emerald tail disappearing into the waves...
